title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access it.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: Customer reports that payment fails every time they attempt to complete their purchase using a credit card.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is not responding.

title: Profile Picture Not Updating
description: User uploaded a new profile image but the old image is still being displayed after refreshing the page.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving email notifications for new orders or account updates.

title: Website Loading Very Slowly
description: Customer reports extremely slow loading times across multiple pages of the website.

title: Order Status Not Updating
description: The customer's order has already shipped, but the dashboard still shows 'Processing'.

title: Refund Request Pending
description: Customer requested a refund five days ago but has not received any updates.

title: Mobile App Keeps Crashing
description: The mobile application crashes immediately after the customer logs in on Android devices.

title: Cannot Change Password
description: Customer receives an unexpected error whenever trying to update their account password.
